GenAiPlugin.description: Use this subagent for any retail expansion analysis — scoring a specific location, finding high-demand areas, identifying blind spots, analyzing competition, or evaluating financial projections.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user asks to score, evaluate, or analyze a specific location, use Analyze_Site_Score_Flow passing the location name as locationQuery.
If the user asks about demand scores generally or wants to compare sites, use Find_Blind_Spots_Flow to return ranked high-demand locations.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Analyze retail expansion opportunities by scoring specific locations and identifying high-demand, low-competition sites across India using demand scores, competitor data, and financial projections.
